---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: Report a bug or unexpected behavior in Sailock
labels: bug
assignees: Sailok25

---

## Description
A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened. Include error messages or screenshots if relevant.

## Environment
- Sailock version: (e.g. v1.3.0 — visible in the sidebar bottom)
- Windows version: (e.g. Windows 10 22H2 / Windows 11 23H2)
- .NET Runtime: (e.g. .NET 8.0 — run `dotnet --version` in a terminal)

## Additional Context
Any other context that might help reproduce or diagnose the issue.
